nodes.label: AI as social buffer for introverts
nodes.grounding_span: I'm an introvert, so I like that my CRM can follow up with leads without me

nodes.label: AI for summarization and research
nodes.grounding_span: I like that AI can summarize data for me and I don't have to take the time to read it

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: Solo manual analysis without AI input
nodes.grounding_span: I like to go over my underwriting with AI to brainstorm potential creative deal structures

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: Distrust due to risk of error
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't trust it to do so

nodes.label: AI accuracy in numerical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI inconsistency and errors in numbers
nodes.grounding_span: how easily AI can get with numbers when underwriting deals

nodes.label: AI up-to-date knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I love that I usually know some market insight or deal strategy right off the top of my head - because it was given to me by AI

nodes.label: AI as assistant for complex work
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to be able to give AI a basic instruction, order, or command & it follow through on all the steps

nodes.label: Social energy conservation
nodes.grounding_span: I'm an introvert, so I like that my CRM can follow up with leads without me

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: Time has value & I don't like spending my time on things I don't need to

nodes.label: Professional reputation and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: Helps me to appear like a legit expert

nodes.label: Risk avoidance
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't want the AI to legally tie me to a price or terms I didn't actually want

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I love that I usually know some market insight or deal strategy right off the top of my head

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: it's frustrating that AI struggles to do this and provide a consistent accurate answer

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
